summary: SDPS Election iteration 3 backend + frontend testing complete. Backend: 10/10 pytest tests pass covering public /api/results (no-auth, votes+adjustment apply, updated_at changes), /admin/stats class_breakdown + real_votes/adjustment/votes per entry, candidate adjustment persistence, vote PUT/DELETE (edit ballot, then delete -> voter returns Pending, can revote), election_open lock (close -> POST /votes 403 with 'closed', reopen -> 200). Frontend: /results loads without auth showing Live Tally heading, KPI cards, per-post bars with Leading: <name> gold pill, AUTO-REFRESH timestamp visible (refresh worked - render confirmed via screenshot at 11:18:31 AM). Closed-banner (data-testid='closed-banner') shown on '/' when election_open=false. Admin login (Aarav/Krish@2026) succeeds via testid inputs. Overview shows Class-wise Turnout text. Voters tab: pencil (data-testid='edit-ballot-SDPSS004') + trash (data-testid='del-ballot-SDPSS004') render for voted students; edit modal opens with per-post selects (data-testid='ballot-edit-{post_key}'); Save -> 'Ballot updated' toast and PUT /api/admin/votes/{id} succeeds. Candidates tab: edit modal exposes data-testid='cand-adjustment-input' (number input); setting +5 saves via PUT and 'Adj: +5' badge becomes visible. Settings tab has data-testid='toggle-election-btn', data-testid='declaration-link', and 'Open Live Results' link (target=_blank to /results). Declaration page (/admin/declaration) renders Print Declaration button (data-testid='print-declaration-btn'), school logo, winners with photos and gold ring, totals KPIs.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py still uses deprecated FastAPI @app.on_event('startup'/'shutdown') - migrate to lifespan context manager (carry-over).
server.py is now 648 lines and approaching the 700-line guideline; consider splitting routers (admin, public, auth) into separate files for maintainability.
DELETE /api/admin/users/{admission_no} still does not also delete the user's vote (orphan ballots possible). Inconsistent with new ballot-delete-then-revote flow.

/api/results computes total_users including teachers but teachers don't currently figure in class_breakdown, so 'Eligible' KPI on /results (11) > sum of class_breakdown student totals (8). Acceptable, but worth documenting.
candidate adjustment field accepts negative values silently (no min-bound validation); admin could push a candidate's tally below zero. Consider clamping to 0 in API.

PUT /api/admin/votes/{id} does not validate that body.selections covers all active post keys (it only validates that supplied selections are valid). Admin could partially update a ballot leaving an invalid post-key selection out; current code does $set the whole selections object so missing keys are dropped. This is a correctness concern - recommend requiring full selection set on update or merging instead of replacing.
AdminDashboard.jsx is 923 lines - candidate sections, ballot edit modal, voters table all in one file; consider splitting modals into own files.

Open Live Results / Declaration links live inside the Settings tab card, not the persistent sidebar - review request wording 'Sidebar links' was a minor mismatch but UX-wise these are reachable; could also be hoisted to sidebar for visibility.

success_rate.frontend: 100% on flows tested (live results page, closed banner, admin login, class chart, voters edit/delete buttons + edit modal save, candidate adjustment field + Adj badge, settings toggle + declaration link, declaration page with print button)

test_credentials: Admin: Aarav / Krish@2026 (verified). Voters: SDPSS001..SDPSS008 students, SDPSE01..SDPSE03 teachers (verified).
seed_data_creation: Tests cast votes for SDPSS001..SDPSS004 during runs and applied/cleared candidate adjustments. All cleaned up via /admin/reset/votes and adjustment=0 reset. Election left in OPEN state.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py (10 tests, ~3.6s). Module-level fixture resets votes + reopens election before/after, and zeroes adjustments. Backend has hot reload but if /admin/reset/all is run, restart backend (sudo supervisorctl restart backend) to re-seed. Key new testids: closed-banner (AuthPage), edit-ballot-{adm}, del-ballot-{adm}, ballot-edit-{post_key}, ballot-save-btn (in BallotEditModal inside Voters tab), cand-adjustment-input + cand-save-btn (Candidate edit modal), toggle-election-btn + declaration-link (Settings tab), print-declaration-btn (Declaration page), tab-{key} for sidebar tabs, mtab-{key} for mobile tabs. AdminLogin now exposes admin-username-input/admin-password-input/admin-login-btn. Voters tab data only refreshes on tab activation - tests that pre-cast a vote via API should login AFTER casting OR re-click tab-voters to force refetch. Live Results page (/results) has Live Tally heading rendered by font-display split spans 'Live' + 'Tally'; KPI cards order: Eligible / Voted / Turnout / Categories.
rca of the issue: No bugs found. All iteration 3 features behave per spec. Initial UI test reported 'Edit ballot btn: False' because the vote was cast right BEFORE login; AdminDashboard fetched stats during login redirect and the new vote wasn't reflected until the next stats refresh. Re-running the test (cast vote -> login -> wait 2s -> click voters tab) showed buttons + working edit modal + 'Ballot updated' toast, confirming end-to-end ballot edit works.
